commands.review_summary:
The branch relaxes daily-memory path matching and retries bare `YYYY-MM-DD.md` read failures as `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`.

PR surface: Source +26. Total +26 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live current-main reproduction was run here. Source and the linked report show that a bare date read still resolves as an ordinary workspace-root path on current main, but the full model-to-tool route needs real proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer/security review of a guard-preserving fallback; this is not safe for automated repair markers while the proof gate is unmet.
